selfcheck.chosen_text: Refleja la UI accesible y suele ser más estable
selfcheck.justification_from_packet: [A2-Skeptic second full walk] Skeptic: «DOM y locators orientados a usuario» — prefer get_by_role/label/text over fragile CSS nth-child; reflects accessible UI and is more stable. CSS is last resort.
[A2-Skeptic second full walk] Skeptic: «términos, CAPTCHA… handoff humano» — if CAPTCHA appears, stop the robot and create human task. Not external CAPTCHA farms or 100 retries.

selfcheck.chosen_text: Buscar integración no-UI antes de automatizar el browser
selfcheck.justification_from_packet: [A2-Skeptic second full walk] Skeptic: «API/export primero» — before RPA seek API or CSV/XLSX export; RPA is last resort. Decision tree in theory.

selfcheck.chosen_text: Solo fallas transitorias (timeout/red), no captcha/403 de negocio
selfcheck.justification_from_packet: [A2-Skeptic second full walk] Skeptic: «selectores robustos, retries y recovery» — retry only transient errors (network timeout, 429), not business failures (403, captcha).

retrospection.note: Knowledge limited to sequential packets through active section.
